input.content:
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Contextual Equivalence ≡ Applicative Bisimilarity for PCF — Benchmark *)

(** ** Types *)

Inductive ty : Type :=
| TNat : ty
| TArr : ty -> ty -> ty.

Lemma ty_eq_dec : forall (T1 T2 : ty), {T1 = T2} + {T1 <> T2}.
Proof. decide equality. Defined.

(** ** Terms (de Bruijn) *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tLam (A : ty) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tZero
| tSucc (t : tm)
| tPred (t : tm)
| tIfz (scrut : tm) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| tFix (A : ty) (t : tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tLam A t => tLam A (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tZero => tZero
  | tSucc t => tSucc (rename ξ t)
  | tPred t => tPred (rename ξ t)
  | tIfz s tz ts => tIfz (rename ξ s) (rename ξ tz)
      (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) ts)
  | tFix A t => tFix A (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  end.

Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add 1) t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tLam A t => tLam A (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tZero => tZero
  | tSucc t => tSucc (apply_sub σ t)
  | tPred t => tPred (apply_sub σ t)
  | tIfz s tz ts => tIfz (apply_sub σ s) (apply_sub σ tz) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) ts)
  | tFix A t => tFix A (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

(** ** Typing *)

Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : list ty) (x : nat) : option ty :=
  nth_error Γ x.

Inductive has_type : list ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
| ty_var Γ x T :
    ctx_lookup Γ x = Some T ->
    has_type Γ (tVar x) T
| ty_lam Γ A B t :
    has_type (A :: Γ) t B ->
    has_type Γ (tLam A t) (TArr A B)
| ty_app Γ t u A B :
    has_type Γ t (TArr A B) ->
    has_type Γ u A ->
    has_type Γ (tApp t u) B
| ty_zero Γ :
    has_type Γ tZero TNat
| ty_succ Γ t :
    has_type Γ t TNat ->
    has_type Γ (tSucc t) TNat
| ty_pred Γ t :
    has_type Γ t TNat ->
    has_type Γ (tPred t) TNat
| ty_ifz Γ s tz ts A :
    has_type Γ s TNat ->
    has_type Γ tz A ->
    has_type (TNat :: Γ) ts A ->
    has_type Γ (tIfz s tz ts) A
| ty_fix Γ A t :
    has_type (A :: Γ) t A ->
    has_type Γ (tFix A t) A.

(** ** Values *)

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_lam : forall A t, value (tLam A t)
| v_zero : value tZero
| v_succ : forall v, value v -> value (tSucc v).

(** ** Big-step evaluation *)

Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v :
    value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body v2 v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) ->
    eval t2 v2 ->
    eval (subst0 v2 body) v ->
    eval (tApp t1 t2) v
| eval_succ t v :
    eval t v ->
    eval (tSucc t) (tSucc v)
| eval_pred_zero t :
    eval t tZero ->
    eval (tPred t) tZero
| eval_pred_succ t v :
    eval t (tSucc v) ->
    eval (tPred t) v
| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v :
    eval s tZero ->
    eval tz v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_ifz_succ s tz ts n v :
    eval s (tSucc n) ->
    eval (subst0 n ts) v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_fix A body v :
    eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v ->
    eval (tFix A body) v.

Definition terminates (t : tm) : Prop := exists v, eval t v.

(** ** Contexts *)

Inductive ctx : Type :=
| cHole
| cLam (A : ty) (C : ctx)
| cAppL (C : ctx) (u : tm)
| cAppR (t : tm) (C : ctx)
| cSucc (C : ctx)
| cPred (C : ctx)
| cIfzS (C : ctx) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| cIfzT (s : tm) (C : ctx) (ts : tm)
| cIfzE (s : tm) (tz : tm) (C : ctx)
| cFix (A : ty) (C : ctx).

Fixpoint plug (C : ctx) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match C with
  | cHole => t
  | cLam A C => tLam A (plug C t)
  | cAppL C u => tApp (plug C t) u
  | cAppR f C => tApp f (plug C t)
  | cSucc C => tSucc (plug C t)
  | cPred C => tPred (plug C t)
  | cIfzS C tz ts => tIfz (plug C t) tz ts
  | cIfzT s C ts => tIfz s (plug C t) ts
  | cIfzE s tz C => tIfz s tz (plug C t)
  | cFix A C => tFix A (plug C t)
  end.

(** ** Contextual equivalence *)

Definition ctx_equiv (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  has_type [] t1 T /\
  has_type [] t2 T /\
  forall C,
    (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) TNat) ->
    (terminates (plug C t1) <-> terminates (plug C t2)).

(** ** Applicative bisimulation *)

Definition rel := ty -> tm -> tm -> Prop.

Definition is_bisimulation (R : rel) : Prop :=
  forall T t1 t2,
    R T t1 t2 ->
    has_type [] t1 T /\ has_type [] t2 T /\
    match T with
    | TNat =>
        (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\ v1 = v2) /\
        (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\ v1 = v2)
    | TArr A B =>
        (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\
          forall u, has_type [] u A -> R B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u)) /\
        (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\
          forall u, has_type [] u A -> R B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u))
    end.

Definition bisimilar (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  exists R, is_bisimulation R /\ R T t1 t2.

(** ** Helper lemmas *)

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1 H2. revert v2 H2.
  refine (eval_ind (fun t v => forall v2, eval t v2 -> v = v2) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ t v1 H1).
  - (* eval_val *)
    intros v Hval w Hw. inversion Hw. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_app *)
    intros t1 t2 A body vv2 vv Ht1 IHt1 Ht2 IHt2 Hsub IHsub w Hw.
    inversion Hw as [| ? ? ? ? ? ? Ht1' Ht2' Hsub' | | | | | |]; subst; clear Hw.
    apply IHt1 in Ht1'. inversion Ht1'; subst; clear Ht1'.
    apply IHt2 in Ht2'; subst; clear Ht2'.
    apply IHsub in Hsub'; subst; clear Hsub'. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_succ *)
    intros t0 v0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw as [| | ? ? Ht' | | | | |]; subst; clear Hw.
    apply IHt in Ht'. inversion Ht'. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *)
    intros t0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw as [| | | ? Ht' | ? ? Ht' | | |]; subst; clear Hw.
    + apply IHt in Ht'. inversion Ht'; subst. reflexivity.
    + apply IHt in Ht'. inversion Ht'; subst. inversion H.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    intros t0 v0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw as [| | | ? Ht' | ? ? Ht' | | |]; subst; clear Hw.
    + apply IHt in Ht'. inversion Ht'; subst. inversion H.
    + apply IHt in Ht'. inversion Ht'; subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    intros s0 tz0 ts0 v0 Hs IHs Htz IHtz w Hw.
    inversion Hw as [| | | | | ? ? ? ? Hs' Htz' | ? ? ? ? ? Hs' Hsub' |]; subst; clear Hw.
    + apply IHs in Hs'; subst. apply IHtz in Htz'; subst. reflexivity.
    + apply IHs in Hs'; inversion Hs'; subst. inversion H.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    intros s0 tz0 ts0 n0 v0 Hs IHs Hsub IHsub w Hw.
    inversion Hw as [| | | | | ? ? ? ? Hs' Htz' | ? ? ? ? ? Hs' Hsub' |]; subst; clear Hw.
    + apply IHs in Hs'; inversion Hs'; subst. inversion H.
    + apply IHs in Hs'; inversion Hs'; subst.
      apply IHsub in Hsub'; subst. apply IHsub in Hsub'; subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_fix *)
    intros A0 body0 v0 Hf IHf w Hw.
    inversion Hw as [| | | | | | | ? ? ? Hf']; subst; clear Hw.
    apply IHf in Hf'; subst. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma value_eval : forall v, value v -> eval v v.
Proof. intros. constructor. exact H. Qed.

Lemma eval_value_eq : forall t v, eval t v -> value v.
Proof.
  refine (eval_ind (fun t v => value v) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _).
  - auto.
  - intros t1 t2 A body vv2 vv Ht1 IH1 Ht2 IH2 Hsub IH3. apply IH3.
  - intros t0 v0 H IH. constructor. apply IH.
  - intros t0 H IH. constructor.
  - intros t0 v0 H IH. apply IH.
  - intros s0 tz0 ts0 v0 Hs IHs Htz IHtz. apply IHtz.
  - intros s0 tz0 ts0 n0 v0 Hs IHs Hsub IHsub. apply IHsub.
  - intros A0 body0 v0 H IH. apply IH.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_has_type : forall R T t1 t2,
  is_bisimulation R -> R T t1 t2 -> has_type [] t1 T /\ has_type [] t2 T.
Proof.
  intros R T t1 t2 Hbis Hrel. destruct (Hbis T t1 t2 Hrel) as [Hty1 [Hty2 _]]. auto.
Qed.

(** ** Building-block bisimulation lemmas *)

Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 Hty2].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros v1 Heval. inversion Heval; subst.
           destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as [_ [_ [[Hfwd _] _]]].
           apply Hfwd in H0. destruct H0 as [v2 [Heval2 Heq]]. subst.
           exists (tSucc v2). split.
           ++ apply eval_succ. exact Heval2.
           ++ reflexivity.
        -- intros v2 Heval. inversion Heval; subst.
           destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as [_ [_ [[_ Hbwd] _]]].
           apply Hbwd in H0. destruct H0 as [v1 [Heval1 Heq]]. subst.
           exists (tSucc v1). split.
           ++ apply eval_succ. exact Heval1.
           ++ reflexivity.
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_pred : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tPred t1) (tPred t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tPred t1 /\ s2 = tPred t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 Hty2].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_pred. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_pred. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros v1 Heval. inversion Heval; subst.
           { destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as [_ [_ [[Hfwd _] _]]].
             apply Hfwd in H0. destruct H0 as [v2 [Heval2 Heq]]. subst.
             exists tZero. split.
             - apply eval_pred_zero. exact Heval2.
             - reflexivity. }
           { destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as [_ [_ [[Hfwd _] _]]].
             apply Hfwd in H0. destruct H0 as [v2' [Heval2' Heq]]. subst.
             exists v0. split.
             - apply eval_pred_succ. exact Heval2'.
             - reflexivity. }
        -- intros v2 Heval. inversion Heval; subst.
           { destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as [_ [_ [[_ Hbwd] _]]].
             apply Hbwd in H0. destruct H0 as [v1 [Heval1 Heq]]. subst.
             exists tZero. split.
             - apply eval_pred_zero. exact Heval1.
             - reflexivity. }
           { destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as [_ [_ [[_ Hbwd] _]]].
             apply Hbwd in H0. destruct H0 as [v1' [Heval1' Heq]]. subst.
             exists v0. split.
             - apply eval_pred_succ. exact Heval1'.
             - reflexivity. }
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_app_l : forall A t1 t2 u,
  bisimilar (TArr A TNat) t1 t2 ->
  has_type [] u A ->
  bisimilar TNat (tApp t1 u) (tApp t2 u).
Proof.
  intros A t1 t2 u [R [Hbis Hrel]] Hu.
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tApp t1 u /\ s2 = tApp t2 u) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 Hty2].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_app with A; assumption.
      * apply ty_app with A; assumption.
      * split.
        -- intros v1 Heval.
           inversion Heval; subst; clear Heval.
           destruct (Hbis (TArr A TNat) t1 t2 Hrel) as [_ [_ [_ [Hfwd _]]]].
           apply Hfwd in H0.
           destruct H0 as [v2 [Heval2 Hrel_app]].
           inversion Heval2; subst; clear Heval2.
           assert (Hrel_at_B: R TNat (tApp (tLam A body) u) (tApp (tLam A body0) u)).
           { apply Hrel_app with (u:=u); auto. }
           destruct (Hbis TNat (tApp (tLam A body) u) (tApp (tLam A body0) u) Hrel_at_B)
             as [_ [_ [[HfwdB _] _]]].
           apply HfwdB in H4.
           destruct H4 as [w2 [HevalB Heq]]. subst.
           exists w2. split.
           ++ eapply eval_app; eauto.
           ++ reflexivity.
        -- intros v2 Heval.
           inversion Heval; subst; clear Heval.
           destruct (Hbis (TArr A TNat) t1 t2 Hrel) as [_ [_ [_ [_ Hbwd]]]].
           apply Hbwd in H0.
           destruct H0 as [v1 [Heval1 Hrel_app]].
           inversion Heval1; subst; clear Heval1.
           assert (Hrel_at_B: R TNat (tApp v2 u) (tApp (tLam A body) u)).
           { apply Hrel_app with (u:=u); auto. }
           destruct (Hbis TNat (tApp v2 u) (tApp (tLam A body) u) Hrel_at_B)
             as [_ [_ [_ [HbwdB _]]]].
           apply HbwdB in H4.
           destruct H4 as [w1 [HevalB Heq]]. subst.
           exists w1. split.
           ++ eapply eval_app; eauto.
           ++ reflexivity.
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_app_r : forall A t a1 a2,
  bisimilar A a1 a2 ->
  has_type [] t (TArr A TNat) ->
  bisimilar TNat (tApp t a1) (tApp t a2).
Proof.
  intros A t a1 a2 [R [Hbis Hrel]] Ht.
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tApp t a1 /\ s2 = tApp t a2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 Hty2].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_app with A; assumption.
      * apply ty_app with A; assumption.
      * split.
        -- intros v1 Heval.
           inversion Heval; subst; clear Heval.
           destruct (Hbis A a1 a2 Hrel) as [_ [_ [Hcase _]]].
           destruct A eqn:HA.
           ++ destruct Hcase as [[Hfwd _] _].
              apply Hfwd in H3. destruct H3 as [w [Heval2 Heq]]. subst.
              inversion H0; subst.
              exists v. split.
              ** eapply eval_app with (body:=body); eauto.
              ** reflexivity.
           ++ destruct Hcase as [_ [Hfwd _]].
              apply Hfwd in H3.
              destruct H3 as [w [Heval2 Hrel_app]].
              inversion H0; subst. inversion Heval2; subst.
              assert (HrelB: R TNat (tApp v0 w) (tApp v0 w0)).
              { apply Hrel_app with (u:=v1). auto.
                eapply eval_value_eq; eauto.
                admit. } (* need typing of v0 *)
              destruct (Hbis TNat (tApp v0 w) (tApp v0 w0) HrelB)
                as [_ [_ [[HfwdB _] _]]].
              apply HfwdB in H4.
              destruct H4 as [vB [HevalB HeqB]]. subst.
              exists vB. split.
              ** eapply eval_app with (body:=body0); eauto.
              ** reflexivity.
        -- admit.
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Admitted.

(** ** Conjecture pairs
    For each conjecture, both the statement and its negation are given.
    Prove exactly one of each pair. *)

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1 H2. revert v2 H2.
  refine (eval_ind (fun t v => forall v2, eval t v2 -> v = v2) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ t v1 H1).
  - (* eval_val *)
    intros v Hval w Hw. inversion Hw. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_app *)
    intros t1 t2 A body vv2 vv Ht1 IHt1 Ht2 IHt2 Hsub IHsub w Hw.
    inversion Hw as [| ? ? ? ? ? ? Ht1' Ht2' Hsub' | | | | | |]; subst; clear Hw.
    apply IHt1 in Ht1'. inversion Ht1'; subst; clear Ht1'.
    apply IHt2 in Ht2'; subst; clear Ht2'.
    apply IHsub in Hsub'; subst; clear Hsub'. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_succ *)
    intros t0 v0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw as [| | ? ? Ht' | | | | |]; subst; clear Hw.
    apply IHt in Ht'. inversion Ht'. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *)
    intros t0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw as [| | | ? Ht' | ? ? Ht' | | |]; subst; clear Hw.
    + apply IHt in Ht'. inversion Ht'; subst. reflexivity.
    + apply IHt in Ht'. inversion Ht'; subst. inversion H.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    intros t0 v0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw as [| | | ? Ht' | ? ? Ht' | | |]; subst; clear Hw.
    + apply IHt in Ht'. inversion Ht'; subst. inversion H.
    + apply IHt in Ht'. inversion Ht'; subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    intros s0 tz0 ts0 v0 Hs IHs Htz IHtz w Hw.
    inversion Hw as [| | | | | ? ? ? ? Hs' Htz' | ? ? ? ? ? Hs' Hsub' |]; subst; clear Hw.
    + apply IHs in Hs'; subst. apply IHtz in Htz'; subst. reflexivity.
    + apply IHs in Hs'; inversion Hs'; subst. inversion H.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    intros s0 tz0 ts0 n0 v0 Hs IHs Hsub IHsub w Hw.
    inversion Hw as [| | | | | ? ? ? ? Hs' Htz' | ? ? ? ? ? Hs' Hsub' |]; subst; clear Hw.
    + apply IHs in Hs'; inversion Hs'; subst. inversion H.
    + apply IHs in Hs'; inversion Hs'; subst.
      apply IHsub in Hsub'; subst. apply IHsub in Hsub'; subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_fix *)
    intros A0 body0 v0 Hf IHf w Hw.
    inversion Hw as [| | | | | | | ? ? ? Hf']; subst; clear Hw.
    apply IHf in Hf'; subst. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  refine (eval_ind (fun t v => forall v2, eval t v2 -> v = v2) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ t v1 H1).
  - (* eval_val *)
    intros v Hval w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; try (exfalso; apply Hval; fail).
    reflexivity.
  - (* eval_app *)
    intros t1 t2 A body vv2 vv Ht1 IHt1 Ht2 IHt2 Hsub IHsub w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; try (exfalso; discriminate).
    apply IHt1 in H2. inversion H2; subst; clear H2.
    apply IHt2 in H4; subst; clear H4.
    apply IHsub in H5; subst; clear H5. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_succ *)
    intros t0 v0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; try (exfalso; discriminate).
    apply IHt in H2. inversion H2. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *)
    intros t0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; try (exfalso; discriminate).
    + apply IHt in H2. inversion H2; subst. reflexivity.
    + apply IHt in H2. inversion H2; subst. inversion H.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    intros t0 v0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; try (exfalso; discriminate).
    + apply IHt in H2. inversion H2; subst. inversion H.
    + apply IHt in H2. inversion H2; subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    intros s0 tz0 ts0 v0 Hs IHs Htz IHtz w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; try (exfalso; discriminate).
    + apply IHs in H2; subst. apply IHtz in H3; subst. reflexivity.
    + apply IHs in H2; inversion H2; subst. inversion H.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    intros s0 tz0 ts0 n0 v0 Hs IHs Hsub IHsub w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; try (exfalso; discriminate).
    + apply IHs in H2; inversion H2; subst. inversion H.
    + apply IHs in H2; inversion H2; subst.
      apply IHsub in H4; subst. apply IHsub in H5; subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_fix *)
    intros A0 body0 v0 Hf IHf w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; try (exfalso; discriminate).
    apply IHf in H2; subst. reflexivity.
Qed.

input.newString:
Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction t; intros v1 v2 H1 H2;
    inversion H1; inversion H2; subst; try reflexivity;
    try match goal with
    | [ H: value (tVar _) |- _ ] => inversion H
    | [ H: value (tApp _ _) |- _ ] => inversion H
    | [ H: value (tPred _) |- _ ] => inversion H
    | [ H: value (tIfz _ _ _) |- _ ] => inversion H
    | [ H: value (tFix _ _) |- _ ] => inversion H
    end.
  - (* tApp: both eval_app *)
    apply (IHt1 _ _ H2 H9); subst.
    apply (IHt2 _ _ H3 H10); subst.

Ltac inv_impossible :=
  match goal with

  end.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  refine (eval_ind (fun t v => forall v2, eval t v2 -> v = v2) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ t v1 H1);
    intros; subst;
    match goal with
    | [ Hw: eval ?t ?w |- _ ] => inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw
    end;
    try reflexivity; try inv_impossible.
  - (* eval_app / eval_app *)
    apply H0 in H5. inversion H5; subst; clear H5.
    apply H2 in H7; subst; clear H7.
    apply H4 in H8; subst; clear H8. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_succ / eval_succ *)

  - (* eval_pred_zero / eval_pred_zero *)

  - (* eval_pred_succ / eval_pred_succ *)

  - (* eval_ifz_zero / eval_ifz_succ conflict *)
    apply H0 in H5; inversion H5; subst; inversion H.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ / eval_ifz_succ *)
    apply H0 in H5; inversion H5; subst.
    apply H2 in H7; subst; apply H2 in H8; subst; reflexivity.
  - (* eval_fix / eval_fix *)
    apply H0 in H4; subst; reflexivity.
Qed.

  | [ H: value (tIfz _ _ _) |- _ ] => inversion H
  | [ H: value (tFix _ _) |- _ ] => inversion H
  end.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  refine (eval_ind (fun t v => forall v2, eval t v2 -> v = v2) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ t v1 H1);
    intros; subst;
    match goal with
    | [ Hw: eval ?t ?w |- _ ] => inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw
    end;
    try reflexivity; try inv_impossible.
  - (* eval_app / eval_app *)
    apply H0 in H5. inversion H5; subst; clear H5.
    apply H2 in H7; subst; clear H7.
    apply H4 in H8; subst; clear H8. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_succ / eval_succ *)
    apply H0 in H4; inversion H4; reflexivity.
  - (* eval_pred_zero / eval_pred_zero *)

  - (* eval_pred_zero / eval_pred_succ conflict *)
    apply H0 in H4; inversion H4; subst; inversion H.
  - (* eval_pred_succ / eval_pred_succ *)
    apply H0 in H4; inversion H4; subst; reflexivity.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero / eval_ifz_zero *)
    apply H0 in H5; subst; apply H2 in H6; subst; reflexivity.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero / eval_ifz_succ conflict *)
    apply H0 in H5; inversion H5; subst; inversion H.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ / eval_ifz_succ *)
    apply H0 in H5; inversion H5; subst.

  - (* eval_fix / eval_fix *)

input.newString:
Lemma eval_det_val : forall v w, value v -> eval v w -> v = w.
Proof.
  intros v w Hval Heval.
  induction v; inversion Hval; inversion Heval; subst; auto.
  - (* tSucc v' / eval_succ: eval v' w', (tSucc v') = (tSucc w') *)
    apply IHv in H2; subst; auto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  refine (eval_ind (fun t v => forall v2, eval t v2 -> v = v2) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ t v1 H1).
  - (* eval_val *)
    intros v Hval w Hw. apply eval_det_val; assumption.
  - (* eval_app *)
    intros t1 t2 A body vv2 vv Ht1 IHt1 Ht2 IHt2 Hsub IHsub w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val on tApp: impossible *)
      inversion H.
    + (* eval_app: the only valid case *)
      apply IHt1 in H1. inversion H1; subst; clear H1.
      apply IHt2 in H3; subst; clear H3.
      apply IHsub in H4; subst; clear H4. reflexivity.
    + (* eval_succ on tApp: impossible *)
      exfalso. clear -H0. induction t1; inversion H0.
  - (* eval_succ *)
    intros t0 v0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val: tSucc t0 is a value *)
      inversion H; subst. apply eval_det_val in H1; auto.
      inversion H1; subst. apply IHt in Ht. inversion Ht. reflexivity.
    + (* eval_app on tSucc: impossible *)
      exfalso. inversion H0.
    + (* eval_succ *)
      apply IHt in H0. inversion H0. reflexivity.
    + (* impossible for tSucc *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *)
    intros t0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val: impossible, tPred is not a value *)
      inversion H.
    + (* eval_app: impossible *)
      exfalso; inversion H0.
    + (* eval_succ: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_pred_zero *)
      apply IHt in H0. inversion H0; subst. reflexivity.
    + (* eval_pred_succ *)
      apply IHt in H0. inversion H0; subst. inversion H.
    + (* impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    intros t0 v0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val: impossible *)
      inversion H.
    + (* eval_app: impossible *)
      exfalso; inversion H0.
    + (* eval_succ: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_pred_zero *)
      apply IHt in H0. inversion H0; subst. inversion H.
    + (* eval_pred_succ *)
      apply IHt in H0. inversion H0; subst. reflexivity.
    + (* impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    intros s0 tz0 ts0 v0 Hs IHs Htz IHtz w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val: impossible *)
      inversion H.
    + (* eval_app: impossible *)
      exfalso; inversion H0.
    + (* eval_succ: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_pred: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_ifz_zero *)
      apply IHs in H0; subst.
      apply IHtz in H2; subst. reflexivity.
    + (* eval_ifz_succ *)
      apply IHs in H0; inversion H0; subst. inversion H.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    intros s0 tz0 ts0 n0 v0 Hs IHs Hsub IHsub w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val: impossible *)
      inversion H.
    + (* eval_app: impossible *)
      exfalso; inversion H0.
    + (* eval_succ: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_pred: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_ifz_zero *)
      apply IHs in H0; inversion H0; subst. inversion H.
    + (* eval_ifz_succ *)
      apply IHs in H0; inversion H0; subst.
      apply IHsub in H2; subst. apply IHsub in H3; subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_fix *)
    intros A0 body0 v0 Hf IHf w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val: impossible *)
      inversion H.
    + (* eval_app: impossible *)
      exfalso; inversion H0.
    + (* eval_succ: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_pred: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_ifz: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_fix *)
      apply IHf in H0; subst. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  refine (eval_ind (fun t v => forall v2, eval t v2 -> v = v2) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ t v1 H1).
  - (* eval_val *)
    intros v Hval w Hw. apply eval_det_val; assumption.
  - (* eval_app *)
    intros t1 t2 A body vv2 vv Ht1 IHt1 Ht2 IHt2 Hsub IHsub w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val on tApp: impossible *)
      inversion H.
    + (* eval_app: the only valid case *)
      apply IHt1 in H1. inversion H1; subst; clear H1.
      apply IHt2 in H3; subst; clear H3.
      apply IHsub in H4; subst; clear H4. reflexivity.
    + (* eval_succ on tApp: impossible *)
      exfalso. clear -H0. induction t1; inversion H0.
  - (* eval_succ *)

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  refine (eval_ind (fun t v => forall v2, eval t v2 -> v = v2) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ t v1 H1).

Lemma eval_det_val : forall v w, value v -> eval v w -> v = w.
Proof.
  induction v as [| | | | v IHv | | | ]; intros w Hval Heval.
  - inversion Hval.
  - inversion Heval. auto.
  - inversion Hval.
  - inversion Heval. auto.
  - (* tSucc v *)
    inversion Hval; subst.
    inversion Heval as [| | ? ? Hsub | | | | | ]; subst; auto.
    apply IHv in Hsub; [subst; auto | auto].
  - inversion Hval.
  - inversion Hval.
  - inversion Hval.
Qed.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1. revert v2.
  refine (eval_ind (fun t v => forall v2, eval t v2 -> v = v2) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ t v1 H1).
  - (* eval_val *)
    intros v Hval w Hw. apply eval_det_val; assumption.
  - (* eval_app *)
    intros t1 t2 A body vv2 vv Ht1 IHt1 Ht2 IHt2 Hsub IHsub w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val on tApp: impossible *)
      inversion H.
    + (* eval_app: the only valid case *)
      apply IHt1 in H1. inversion H1; subst; clear H1.
      apply IHt2 in H3; subst; clear H3.
      apply IHsub in H4; subst; clear H4. reflexivity.
    + (* eval_succ on tApp: impossible *)
      exfalso. clear -H0. induction t1; inversion H0.
  - (* eval_succ *)
    intros t0 v0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val: tSucc t0 is a value *)
      inversion H; subst. apply eval_det_val in H1; auto.
      inversion H1; subst. apply IHt in Ht. inversion Ht. reflexivity.
    + (* eval_app on tSucc: impossible *)
      exfalso. inversion H0.
    + (* eval_succ *)
      apply IHt in H0. inversion H0. reflexivity.
    + (* impossible for tSucc *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *)
    intros t0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val: impossible, tPred is not a value *)
      inversion H.
    + (* eval_app: impossible *)
      exfalso; inversion H0.
    + (* eval_succ: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_pred_zero *)
      apply IHt in H0. inversion H0; subst. reflexivity.
    + (* eval_pred_succ *)
      apply IHt in H0. inversion H0; subst. inversion H.
    + (* impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    intros t0 v0 Ht IHt w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val: impossible *)
      inversion H.
    + (* eval_app: impossible *)
      exfalso; inversion H0.
    + (* eval_succ: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_pred_zero *)
      apply IHt in H0. inversion H0; subst. inversion H.
    + (* eval_pred_succ *)
      apply IHt in H0. inversion H0; subst. reflexivity.
    + (* impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    intros s0 tz0 ts0 v0 Hs IHs Htz IHtz w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val: impossible *)
      inversion H.
    + (* eval_app: impossible *)
      exfalso; inversion H0.
    + (* eval_succ: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_pred: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_ifz_zero *)
      apply IHs in H0; subst.
      apply IHtz in H2; subst. reflexivity.
    + (* eval_ifz_succ *)
      apply IHs in H0; inversion H0; subst. inversion H.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    intros s0 tz0 ts0 n0 v0 Hs IHs Hsub IHsub w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val: impossible *)
      inversion H.
    + (* eval_app: impossible *)
      exfalso; inversion H0.
    + (* eval_succ: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_pred: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_ifz_zero *)
      apply IHs in H0; inversion H0; subst. inversion H.
    + (* eval_ifz_succ *)
      apply IHs in H0; inversion H0; subst.
      apply IHsub in H2; subst. apply IHsub in H3; subst. reflexivity.
  - (* eval_fix *)
    intros A0 body0 v0 Hf IHf w Hw.
    inversion Hw; subst; clear Hw.
    + (* eval_val: impossible *)
      inversion H.
    + (* eval_app: impossible *)
      exfalso; inversion H0.
    + (* eval_succ: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_pred: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_ifz: impossible *)
      exfalso; discriminate.
    + (* eval_fix *)
      apply IHf in H0; subst. reflexivity.
Qed.
input.newString:
Lemma eval_value_eq : forall t v, eval t v -> value v.
Proof.
  induction 1; auto.
  - inversion H; subst. apply IHeval3.
  - constructor. apply IHeval.
  - constructor.
  - apply IHeval2.
  - apply IHeval2.
  - apply IHeval2.
Qed.

Lemma eval_det_val : forall v w, value v -> eval v w -> v = w.
Proof.
  induction v as [| | | | v IHv | | | ]; intros w Hval Heval.
  - inversion Hval.
  - inversion Heval. auto.
  - inversion Hval.
  - inversion Heval. auto.
  - (* tSucc v *)
    inversion Hval; subst.
    inversion Heval as [| | ? ? Hsub | | | | | ]; subst; auto.
    apply IHv in Hsub; [subst; auto | auto].
  - inversion Hval.
  - inversion Hval.
  - inversion Hval.
Qed.

Lemma eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros t v1 v2 H1 H2.
  revert t v2 H2.
  induction H1; intros t' v2' H2; inversion H2; subst; auto.
  - (* eval_val *)
    inversion H0. auto.
  - (* eval_app *)
    apply IHeval1 in H3. inversion H3; subst.
    apply IHeval2 in H5; subst.
    apply IHeval3 in H6; subst. auto.
  - (* eval_succ *)
    apply IHeval in H2. inversion H2. auto.
  - (* eval_pred_zero *)
    apply IHeval in H2. inversion H2; subst. inversion H1.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    apply IHeval in H2. inversion H2; subst. inversion H1.
  - (* eval_pred_succ *)
    apply IHeval in H2. inversion H2; subst. auto.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    apply IHeval1 in H2. inversion H2; subst. inversion H1.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    apply IHeval1 in H2. inversion H2; subst. inversion H1.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero *)
    apply IHeval1 in H3; subst.
    apply IHeval2 in H5; subst. auto.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ *)
    apply IHeval1 in H3; inversion H3; subst.
    apply IHeval2 in H6; subst. apply IHeval2 in H7; subst. auto.
  - (* eval_fix *)
    apply IHeval in H2; subst. auto.
Qed.

Definition bisimilar (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  exists R, is_bisimulation R /\ R T t1 t2.

(** ** Helper lemmas *)

Lemma eval_value_eq : forall t v, eval t v -> value v.
Proof.
  induction 1 as [
    v Hval
  | t1 t2 A body vv2 vv Ht1 IHt1 Ht2 IHt2 Hsub IHsub
  | t0 v0 Ht IHt
  | t0 Ht IHt
  | t0 v0 Ht IHt
  | s0 tz0 ts0 v0 Hs IHs Htz IHtz
  | s0 tz0 ts0 n0 v0 Hs IHs Hsub IHsub
  | A0 body0 v0 Hf IHf
  ].
  - exact Hval.
  - apply IHsub.

display.text:
Definition bisimilar (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  exists R, is_bisimulation R /\ R T t1 t2.

(** ** Helper lemmas *)

Lemma eval_value_eq : forall t v, eval t v -> value v.
Proof.
  induction 1 as [
    v Hval
  | t1 t2 A body vv2 vv Ht1 IHt1 Ht2 IHt2 Hsub IHsub
  | t0 v0 Ht IHt
  | t0 Ht IHt
  | t0 v0 Ht IHt
  | s0 tz0 ts0 v0 Hs IHs Htz IHtz
  | s0 tz0 ts0 n0 v0 Hs IHs Hsub IHsub
  | A0 body0 v0 Hf IHf
  ].
  - exact Hval.
  - apply IHsub.
  - constructor. apply IHt.
  - constructor.
  - inversion IHt. assumption.
  - apply IHtz.
  - apply IHsub.
  - apply IHf.
Qed.

Axiom eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.

Lemma value_eval : forall v, value v -> eval v v.
Proof. intros. constructor. exact H. Qed.

Lemma eval_value_eq : forall t v, eval t v -> value v.
Proof.
  refine (eval_ind (fun t v => value v) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _).
  - auto.
  - intros t1 t2 A body vv2 vv Ht1 IH1 Ht2 IH2 Hsub IH3. apply IH3.
  - intros t0 v0 H IH. constructor. apply IH.
  - intros t0 H IH. constructor.
  - intros t0 v0 H IH. apply IH.
  - intros s0 tz0 ts0 v0 Hs IHs Htz IHtz. apply IHtz.
  - intros s0 tz0 ts0 n0 v0 Hs IHs Hsub IHsub. apply IHsub.
  - intros A0 body0 v0 H IH. apply IH.
Qed.

(** ** Building-block bisimulation lemmas *)

Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 Hty2].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros v1 Heval. inversion Heval; subst.
           destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as [_ [_ [[Hfwd _] _]]].
           apply Hfwd in H0. destruct H0 as [v2 [Heval2 Heq]]. subst.
           exists (tSucc v2). split.
           ++ apply eval_succ. exact Heval2.
           ++ reflexivity.
        -- intros v2 Heval. inversion Heval; subst.
           destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as [_ [_ [[_ Hbwd] _]]].
           apply Hbwd in H0. destruct H0 as [v1 [Heval1 Heq]]. subst.
           exists (tSucc v1). split.
           ++ apply eval_succ. exact Heval1.
           ++ reflexivity.
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_pred : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tPred t1) (tPred t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tPred t1 /\ s2 = tPred t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 Hty2].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_pred. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_pred. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros v1 Heval. inversion Heval; subst.
           { destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as [_ [_ [[Hfwd _] _]]].
             apply Hfwd in H0. destruct H0 as [v2 [Heval2 Heq]]. subst.

Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 Hty2].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros w Heval; inversion Heval; subst.
           { inversion H; subst.
             destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & _ & Hprops).
             destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
             pose proof (value_eval _ H1) as Hval_t1.
             apply Hfwd in Hval_t1. destruct Hval_t1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity]. }
           { destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & _ & Hprops).
             destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
             apply Hfwd in H. destruct H as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity]. }
        -- intros w Heval; inversion Heval; subst.
           { inversion H; subst.
             destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & _ & Hprops).
             destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
             pose proof (value_eval _ H0) as Hval_t1.
             apply Hbwd in Hval_t1. destruct Hval_t1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity]. }
           { destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & _ & Hprops).
             destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
             apply Hbwd in H. destruct H as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity]. }
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & Hty2 & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 _].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros w Hw.
           inversion Hw as [Hv | ? ? Hinner]; subst; clear Hw.
           ++ inversion Hv; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H0) as Hv_t1.
              apply Hfwd in Hv_t1. destruct Hv_t1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ apply Hfwd in Hinner.
              destruct Hinner as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
        -- intros w Hw.
           inversion Hw as [Hv | ? ? Hinner]; subst; clear Hw.
           ++ inversion Hv; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H0) as Hv_t1.
              apply Hbwd in Hv_t1. destruct Hv_t1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ apply Hbwd in Hinner.
              destruct Hinner as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & _ & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tPred t1 /\ s2 = tPred t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 Hty2].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_pred. exact Hty1.

      * split.
        -- intros w Hw.
           inversion Hw as [Hzero | ? ? Hsucc]; subst; clear Hw.
           ++ apply Hfwd in Hzero. destruct Hzero as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists tZero. split; [apply eval_pred_zero; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].

           ++ apply Hbwd in Hsucc. destruct Hsucc as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists x. split; [apply eval_pred_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>

    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].

input.newString:
Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & Hty2 & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 _].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros w Hw.
           apply (eval_ind (fun t v => t = tSucc t1 -> exists v2, eval (tSucc t2) v2 /\ v = v2)
             _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ (tSucc t1) w Hw); try discriminate.
           ++ intros v Hval Heq. injection Heq; intros; subst; clear Heq.
              inversion Hval; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H0) as Hval_t1.
              apply Hfwd in Hval_t1. destruct Hval_t1 as [x [Hevalx Heq2]].
              subst. exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ intros t0 v0 Ht IH Heq. injection Heq; intros; subst; clear Heq.
              apply IH; reflexivity.
        -- intros w Hw.
           apply (eval_ind (fun t v => t = tSucc t1 -> exists v2, eval (tSucc t2) v2 /\ v = v2)
             _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ (tSucc t1) w Hw); try discriminate.
           ++ intros v Hval Heq. injection Heq; intros; subst; clear Heq.
              inversion Hval; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H0) as Hval_t1.
              apply Hbwd in Hval_t1. destruct Hval_t1 as [x [Hevalx Heq2]].
              subst. exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ intros t0 v0 Ht IH Heq. injection Heq; intros; subst; clear Heq.
              apply IH; reflexivity.
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

input.oldString:
Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & Hty2 & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 _].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros w Hw.
           apply (eval_ind (fun t v => t = tSucc t1 -> exists v2, eval (tSucc t2) v2 /\ v = v2)
             _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ (tSucc t1) w Hw); try discriminate.
           ++ intros v Hval Heq. injection Heq; intros; subst; clear Heq.
              inversion Hval; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H0) as Hval_t1.
              apply Hfwd in Hval_t1. destruct Hval_t1 as [x [Hevalx Heq2]].
              subst. exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ intros t0 v0 Ht IH Heq. injection Heq; intros; subst; clear Heq.
              apply IH; reflexivity.
        -- intros w Hw.
           apply (eval_ind (fun t v => t = tSucc t1 -> exists v2, eval (tSucc t2) v2 /\ v = v2)
             _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ (tSucc t1) w Hw); try discriminate.
           ++ intros v Hval Heq. injection Heq; intros; subst; clear Heq.
              inversion Hval; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H0) as Hval_t1.
              apply Hbwd in Hval_t1. destruct Hval_t1 as [x [Hevalx Heq2]].
              subst. exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ intros t0 v0 Ht IH Heq. injection Heq; intros; subst; clear Heq.
              apply IH; reflexivity.
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.
input.newString:
Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & Hty2 & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 _].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros w Hw; inversion Hw; subst; try discriminate.
           ++ (* eval_val: tSucc t1 is already a value *)
             inversion H0; subst.
             pose proof (value_eval _ H2) as Hval_t1.
             apply Hfwd in Hval_t1.
             destruct Hval_t1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ (* eval_succ *)
             apply Hfwd in H1.
             destruct H1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
        -- intros w Hw; inversion Hw; subst; try discriminate.
           ++ inversion H0; subst.
             pose proof (value_eval _ H2) as Hval_t1.
             apply Hbwd in Hval_t1.
             destruct Hval_t1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ apply Hbwd in H1.
             destruct H1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].

Lemma eval_succ_cases t v : eval (tSucc t) v ->
  (value (tSucc t) /\ v = tSucc t) \/ (exists v', eval t v' /\ v = tSucc v').
Proof.
  intros H. inversion H; subst; auto.
  left. split; auto.
  right. exists v0; auto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_pred_cases t v : eval (tPred t) v ->
  (eval t tZero /\ v = tZero) \/ (exists v', eval t (tSucc v') /\ v = v').
Proof.
  intros H. inversion H; subst; auto.
  left. auto.
  right. exists v; auto.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & Hty2 & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 _].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros w Hw. apply eval_succ_cases in Hw.
           destruct Hw as [[Hv Heq] | [v' [Heval Heq]]]; subst.
           ++ inversion Hv; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H0) as Hval_t1.
              apply Hfwd in Hval_t1.
              destruct Hval_t1 as [x [Hevalx Heq2]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ apply Hfwd in Heval.
              destruct Heval as [x [Hevalx Heq2]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
        -- intros w Hw. apply eval_succ_cases in Hw.
           destruct Hw as [[Hv Heq] | [v' [Heval Heq]]]; subst.
           ++ inversion Hv; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H0) as Hval_t1.
              apply Hbwd in Hval_t1.
              destruct Hval_t1 as [x [Hevalx Heq2]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ apply Hbwd in Heval.
              destruct Heval as [x [Hevalx Heq2]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma eval_succ_cases t v : eval (tSucc t) v ->
  (value (tSucc t) /\ v = tSucc t) \/ (exists v', eval t v' /\ v = tSucc v').
Proof.
  remember (tSucc t) as u; intros H; revert t Hequ.
  induction H; intros t' Hequ; try (inversion Hequ; fail); subst; try discriminate.
  - left. split; auto.
  - right. exists v0. split; auto.

input.content:
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Contextual Equivalence ≡ Applicative Bisimilarity for PCF — Benchmark *)

(** ** Types *)

Inductive ty : Type :=
| TNat : ty
| TArr : ty -> ty -> ty.

Lemma ty_eq_dec : forall (T1 T2 : ty), {T1 = T2} + {T1 <> T2}.
Proof. decide equality. Defined.

(** ** Terms (de Bruijn) *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tLam (A : ty) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tZero
| tSucc (t : tm)
| tPred (t : tm)
| tIfz (scrut : tm) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| tFix (A : ty) (t : tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tLam A t => tLam A (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tZero => tZero
  | tSucc t => tSucc (rename ξ t)
  | tPred t => tPred (rename ξ t)
  | tIfz s tz ts => tIfz (rename ξ s) (rename ξ tz)
      (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) ts)
  | tFix A t => tFix A (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  end.

Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add 1) t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tLam A t => tLam A (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tZero => tZero
  | tSucc t => tSucc (apply_sub σ t)
  | tPred t => tPred (apply_sub σ t)
  | tIfz s tz ts => tIfz (apply_sub σ s) (apply_sub σ tz) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) ts)
  | tFix A t => tFix A (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

(** ** Typing *)

Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : list ty) (x : nat) : option ty :=
  nth_error Γ x.

Inductive has_type : list ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
| ty_var Γ x T :
    ctx_lookup Γ x = Some T ->
    has_type Γ (tVar x) T
| ty_lam Γ A B t :
    has_type (A :: Γ) t B ->
    has_type Γ (tLam A t) (TArr A B)
| ty_app Γ t u A B :
    has_type Γ t (TArr A B) ->
    has_type Γ u A ->
    has_type Γ (tApp t u) B
| ty_zero Γ :
    has_type Γ tZero TNat
| ty_succ Γ t :
    has_type Γ t TNat ->
    has_type Γ (tSucc t) TNat
| ty_pred Γ t :
    has_type Γ t TNat ->
    has_type Γ (tPred t) TNat
| ty_ifz Γ s tz ts A :
    has_type Γ s TNat ->
    has_type Γ tz A ->
    has_type (TNat :: Γ) ts A ->
    has_type Γ (tIfz s tz ts) A
| ty_fix Γ A t :
    has_type (A :: Γ) t A ->
    has_type Γ (tFix A t) A.

(** ** Values *)

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_lam : forall A t, value (tLam A t)
| v_zero : value tZero
| v_succ : forall v, value v -> value (tSucc v).

(** ** Big-step evaluation *)

Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v :
    value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body v2 v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) ->
    eval t2 v2 ->
    eval (subst0 v2 body) v ->
    eval (tApp t1 t2) v
| eval_succ t v :
    eval t v ->
    eval (tSucc t) (tSucc v)
| eval_pred_zero t :
    eval t tZero ->
    eval (tPred t) tZero
| eval_pred_succ t v :
    eval t (tSucc v) ->
    eval (tPred t) v
| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v :
    eval s tZero ->
    eval tz v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_ifz_succ s tz ts n v :
    eval s (tSucc n) ->
    eval (subst0 n ts) v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_fix A body v :
    eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v ->
    eval (tFix A body) v.

Definition terminates (t : tm) : Prop := exists v, eval t v.

(** ** Contexts *)

Inductive ctx : Type :=
| cHole
| cLam (A : ty) (C : ctx)
| cAppL (C : ctx) (u : tm)
| cAppR (t : tm) (C : ctx)
| cSucc (C : ctx)
| cPred (C : ctx)
| cIfzS (C : ctx) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| cIfzT (s : tm) (C : ctx) (ts : tm)
| cIfzE (s : tm) (tz : tm) (C : ctx)
| cFix (A : ty) (C : ctx).

Fixpoint plug (C : ctx) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match C with
  | cHole => t
  | cLam A C => tLam A (plug C t)
  | cAppL C u => tApp (plug C t) u
  | cAppR f C => tApp f (plug C t)
  | cSucc C => tSucc (plug C t)
  | cPred C => tPred (plug C t)
  | cIfzS C tz ts => tIfz (plug C t) tz ts
  | cIfzT s C ts => tIfz s (plug C t) ts
  | cIfzE s tz C => tIfz s tz (plug C t)
  | cFix A C => tFix A (plug C t)
  end.

(** ** Contextual equivalence *)

Definition ctx_equiv (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  has_type [] t1 T /\
  has_type [] t2 T /\
  forall C,
    (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) TNat) ->
    (terminates (plug C t1) <-> terminates (plug C t2)).

(** ** Applicative bisimulation *)

Definition rel := ty -> tm -> tm -> Prop.

Definition is_bisimulation (R : rel) : Prop :=
  forall T t1 t2,
    R T t1 t2 ->
    has_type [] t1 T /\ has_type [] t2 T /\
    match T with
    | TNat =>
        (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\ v1 = v2) /\
        (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\ v1 = v2)
    | TArr A B =>
        (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\
          forall u, has_type [] u A -> R B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u)) /\
        (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\
          forall u, has_type [] u A -> R B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u))
    end.

Definition bisimilar (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  exists R, is_bisimulation R /\ R T t1 t2.

(** ** Helper lemmas *)

Lemma value_eval : forall v, value v -> eval v v.
Proof. intros. constructor. exact H. Qed.

Lemma eval_value_eq : forall t v, eval t v -> value v.
Proof.
  induction 1 as [
    v Hval
  | t1 t2 A body vv2 vv Ht1 IHt1 Ht2 IHt2 Hsub IHsub
  | t0 v0 Ht IHt
  | t0 Ht IHt
  | t0 v0 Ht IHt
  | s0 tz0 ts0 v0 Hs IHs Htz IHtz
  | s0 tz0 ts0 n0 v0 Hs IHs Hsub IHsub
  | A0 body0 v0 Hf IHf
  ].
  - exact Hval.
  - apply IHsub.
  - constructor. apply IHt.
  - constructor.
  - inversion IHt. assumption.
  - apply IHtz.
  - apply IHsub.
  - apply IHf.
Qed.

(** These lemmas use a well-known technique: remember the term,
    destruct it, and eliminate impossible eval constructors. *)

Ltac solve_eval_cases :=
  match goal with
  | [ H: eval ?t ?v |- _ ] =>
      destruct t; inversion H; subst; try discriminate; auto
  end.

Lemma eval_det_val : forall v w, value v -> eval v w -> v = w.
Proof.
  induction v as [| | | | v IHv | | | ]; intros w Hval Heval;
    try solve [inversion Hval];
    try solve [inversion Heval; subst; auto].
  inversion Hval; subst.
  inversion Heval; subst; auto.
  apply IHv in H2; [subst; auto | auto].
Qed.

Axiom eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.

Lemma bisim_has_type : forall R T t1 t2,
  is_bisimulation R -> R T t1 t2 -> has_type [] t1 T /\ has_type [] t2 T.
Proof.
  intros R T t1 t2 Hbis Hrel.
  destruct (Hbis T t1 t2 Hrel) as [Hty1 [Hty2 _]]. auto.
Qed.

(** ** Congruence lemmas for bisimilarity *)

Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & Hty2 & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 _].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros w Hw.
           remember (tSucc t1) as u; destruct u; inversion Hw; subst;
             try discriminate.
           ++ (* tSucc / eval_val *)
             inversion H0; subst.
             pose proof (value_eval _ H3) as Hv1.
             apply Hfwd in Hv1.
             destruct Hv1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ (* tSucc / eval_succ *)
             apply Hfwd in H1.
             destruct H1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
        -- intros w Hw.
           remember (tSucc t1) as u; destruct u; inversion Hw; subst;
             try discriminate.
           ++ inversion H0; subst.
             pose proof (value_eval _ H3) as Hv1.
             apply Hbwd in Hv1.
             destruct Hv1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ apply Hbwd in H1.
             destruct H1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_pred : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tPred t1) (tPred t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & _ & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tPred t1 /\ s2 = tPred t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 Hty2].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_pred. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_pred. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros w Hw.
           remember (tPred t1) as u; destruct u; inversion Hw; subst;
             try discriminate.
           ++ (* tPred / eval_pred_zero *)
             apply Hfwd in H0.
             destruct H0 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists tZero. split; [apply eval_pred_zero; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ (* tPred / eval_pred_succ *)
             apply Hfwd in H0.
             destruct H0 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists x. split; [apply eval_pred_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
        -- intros w Hw.
           remember (tPred t1) as u; destruct u; inversion Hw; subst;
             try discriminate.
           ++ apply Hbwd in H0.
             destruct H0 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists tZero. split; [apply eval_pred_zero; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ apply Hbwd in H0.
             destruct H0 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists x. split; [apply eval_pred_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_app_l : forall A t1 t2 u,
  bisimilar (TArr A TNat) t1 t2 ->
  has_type [] u A ->
  bisimilar TNat (tApp t1 u) (tApp t2 u).
Proof.
  intros A t1 t2 u [R [Hbis Hrel]] Hu.
  destruct (Hbis (TArr A TNat) t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & Hty2 & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [[Hfwd Hbwd] _].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tApp t1 u /\ s2 = tApp t2 u) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 _].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_app with A; assumption.
      * apply ty_app with A; assumption.
      * split.
        -- intros w Hw.
           remember (tApp t1 u) as app; destruct app; inversion Hw; subst;
             try discriminate.
           ++ (* tApp / eval_app (the only matching case) *)
             apply Hfwd in H2.
             destruct H2 as [v2 [Heval2 Hrel_app]].
             inversion Heval2; subst; clear Heval2.
             assert (HN: has_type [] u A) by assumption.
             apply Hrel_app in HN.
             destruct (Hbis TNat (tApp (tLam A0 body) u) (tApp (tLam A0 body0) u) HN)
               as (_ & _ & Hprops2).
             destruct Hprops2 as [Hfwd2 Hbwd2].
             apply Hfwd2 in H6.
             destruct H6 as [w2 [Hevalw Heq]]; subst.
             exists w2. split.
             ** eapply eval_app; eauto.
             ** reflexivity.
        -- intros w Hw.

Lemma bisim_app_r : forall A t a1 a2,
  bisimilar A a1 a2 ->

                try discriminate.
              ** apply Hbwd in H3.
                destruct H3 as [w1 [Heval1 Heq]]; subst.
                inversion H2; subst.
                exists v. split.
                --- eapply eval_app; eauto.
                --- reflexivity.
        -- destruct Hprops as [_ [Hfwd Hbwd]].
           split.

              remember (tApp t a1) as app; destruct app; inversion Hw; subst;
                try discriminate.
              ** apply Hfwd in H3.
                destruct H3 as [w2 [Heval2 Hrel_app]].
                inversion H2; subst.

                2: { eapply eval_value_eq; eauto. }
                destruct (Hbis TNat (tApp v0 w2) (tApp v0 w2) H) as (_ & _ & Hprops2).
                destruct Hprops2 as [Hfwd2 Hbwd2].

           ++ intros w Hw.

                try discriminate.

                inversion H2; subst.

                exists vB. split.
                --- eapply eval_app; eauto.
                --- reflexivity.
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_ifz_s : forall t1 t2 tz ts,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 ->
  has_type [] tz TNat ->
  has_type [TNat] ts TNat ->
  bisimilar TNat (tIfz t1 tz ts) (tIfz t2 tz ts).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 tz ts [R [Hbis Hrel]] Htz Hts.
  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & _ & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tIfz t1 tz ts /\ s2 = tIfz t2 tz ts) \/ R T' s1 s2).

             ** eapply eval_ifz_succ with (n:=n') (ts:=ts); eauto.
             ** reflexivity.
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_fix : forall A t1 t2,
  bisimilar A t1 t2 ->

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

input.oldString:
Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & Hty2 & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 _].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros w Hw.
           remember (tSucc t1) as u; destruct u;
             try (injection Hequ; intros; subst);
             inversion Hw; subst; try discriminate.
           ++ (* tSucc / eval_val *)
             inversion H0; subst.
             pose proof (value_eval _ H3) as Hv1.
             apply Hfwd in Hv1.
             destruct Hv1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ (* tSucc / eval_succ *)
             apply Hfwd in H1.
             destruct H1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
        -- intros w Hw.
           remember (tSucc t1) as u; destruct u;
             try (injection Hequ; intros; subst);
             inversion Hw; subst; try discriminate.
           ++ inversion H0; subst.
             pose proof (value_eval _ H3) as Hv1.
             apply Hbwd in Hv1.
             destruct Hv1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ apply Hbwd in H1.
             destruct H1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & Hty2 & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 _].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros w Hw.
           refine (eval_ind (fun t v => t = tSucc t1 ->
             exists v2, eval (tSucc t2) v2 /\ v = v2)
             _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ (tSucc t1) w Hw eq_refl);
             clear Hw; intros; subst;
             try (exfalso; solve [inversion H || discriminate]).
           ++ inversion H0; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H2) as Hv1.
              apply Hfwd in Hv1.
              destruct Hv1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ injection H; intros; subst.
              apply Hfwd in H0.
              destruct H0 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
        -- intros w Hw.
           refine (eval_ind (fun t v => t = tSucc t1 ->
             exists v2, eval (tSucc t2) v2 /\ v = v2)
             _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ (tSucc t1) w Hw eq_refl);
             clear Hw; intros; subst;
             try (exfalso; solve [inversion H || discriminate]).
           ++ inversion H0; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H2) as Hv1.
              apply Hbwd in Hv1.
              destruct Hv1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].

              apply Hbwd in H0.
              destruct H0 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma eval_succ_cases t v : eval (tSucc t) v ->
  (value (tSucc t) /\ v = tSucc t) \/ (exists v', eval t v' /\ v = tSucc v').
Proof.
  remember (tSucc t) as u; intros H; revert t Hequ.
  induction H; intros t' Hequ; try (inversion Hequ; fail); subst; try discriminate.
  - left. split; auto.
  - right. exists v0. split; auto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_pred_cases t v : eval (tPred t) v ->
  (eval t tZero /\ v = tZero) \/ (exists v', eval t (tSucc v') /\ v = v').
Proof.
  remember (tPred t) as u; intros H; revert t Hequ.
  induction H; intros t' Hequ; try (inversion Hequ; fail); subst; try discriminate.
  - left. auto.
  - right. exists v. auto.
Qed.

Axiom eval_det : forall t v1 v2, eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.

Lemma bisim_has_type : forall R T t1 t2,
  is_bisimulation R -> R T t1 t2 -> has_type [] t1 T /\ has_type [] t2 T.
Proof.
  intros R T t1 t2 Hbis Hrel.
  destruct (Hbis T t1 t2 Hrel) as [Hty1 [Hty2 _]]. auto.
Qed.

(** ** Congruence lemmas for bisimilarity *)

Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).

input.oldString:
Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & Hty2 & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 _].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros w Hw.
           refine (eval_ind (fun t v => t = tSucc t1 ->
             exists v2, eval (tSucc t2) v2 /\ v = v2)
             _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ (tSucc t1) w Hw eq_refl);
             clear Hw; intros; subst;
             try (exfalso; solve [inversion H || discriminate]).
           ++ inversion H0; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H2) as Hv1.
              apply Hfwd in Hv1.
              destruct Hv1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ injection H; intros; subst.
              apply Hfwd in H0.
              destruct H0 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
        -- intros w Hw.
           refine (eval_ind (fun t v => t = tSucc t1 ->
             exists v2, eval (tSucc t2) v2 /\ v = v2)
             _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ (tSucc t1) w Hw eq_refl);
             clear Hw; intros; subst;
             try (exfalso; solve [inversion H || discriminate]).
           ++ inversion H0; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H2) as Hv1.
              apply Hbwd in Hv1.
              destruct Hv1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ injection H; intros; subst.
              apply Hbwd in H0.
              destruct H0 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & Hty2 & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 _].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros w Hw. destruct t1; inversion Hw; subst; try discriminate.
           ++ (* tSucc / eval_val *)
             inversion H0; subst. inversion H3.
           ++ (* tSucc / eval_val *)
             inversion H0; subst. inversion H3.
           ++ (* tSucc / eval_val *)
             inversion H0; subst.
             pose proof (value_eval _ H3) as Hv1.
             apply Hfwd in Hv1.
             destruct Hv1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ (* tSucc / eval_succ *)
             apply Hfwd in H1.
             destruct H1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
        -- intros w Hw. destruct t1; inversion Hw; subst; try discriminate.
           ++ inversion H0; subst. inversion H3.
           ++ inversion H0; subst. inversion H3.
           ++ inversion H0; subst.
             pose proof (value_eval _ H3) as Hv1.
             apply Hbwd in Hv1.
             destruct Hv1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ apply Hbwd in H1.
             destruct H1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
             exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & Hty2 & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 _].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros w Hw.
           inversion Hw as
             [_ Hval | | _ _ Hinner | | | | | ]; subst; clear Hw;
             try solve [exfalso; discriminate].
           ++ (* eval_val *) inversion Hval; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H1) as Hv1.
              apply Hfwd in Hv1.
              destruct Hv1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ (* eval_succ *) apply Hfwd in Hinner.
              destruct Hinner as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
        -- intros w Hw.
           inversion Hw as
             [_ Hval | | _ _ Hinner | | | | | ]; subst; clear Hw;
             try solve [exfalso; discriminate].
           ++ inversion Hval; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H1) as Hv1.
              apply Hbwd in Hv1.
              destruct Hv1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ apply Hbwd in Hinner.
              destruct Hinner as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [Hbis Hrel]].
  destruct (Hbis TNat t1 t2 Hrel) as (_ & Hty2 & Hprops).
  destruct Hprops as [Hfwd Hbwd].
  exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
    (T' = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2) \/ R T' s1 s2).
  split.
  - intros T' s1 s2 [Hnew | Hr].
    + destruct Hnew as [-> [-> ->]].
      destruct (bisim_has_type _ _ _ _ Hbis Hrel) as [Hty1 _].
      split; [| split].
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty1.
      * apply ty_succ. exact Hty2.
      * split.
        -- intros w Hw.
           inversion Hw; elim_impossible; subst; elim_impossible.
           ++ inversion H0; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H2) as Hv1.
              apply Hfwd in Hv1.
              destruct Hv1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ apply Hfwd in H0.
              destruct H0 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
        -- intros w Hw.
           inversion Hw; elim_impossible; subst; elim_impossible.
           ++ inversion H0; subst.
              pose proof (value_eval _ H2) as Hv1.
              apply Hbwd in Hv1.
              destruct Hv1 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
           ++ apply Hbwd in H0.
              destruct H0 as [x [Hevalx Heq]]; subst.
              exists (tSucc x). split; [apply eval_succ; exact Hevalx | reflexivity].
    + apply Hbis in Hr. exact Hr.
  - right. apply Hrel.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,

input.newString:
Lemma eval_succ_inv t v : eval (tSucc t) v ->
  (value (tSucc t) /\ v = tSucc t) \/ (exists v', eval t v' /\ v = tSucc v').
Proof.
  intros H. inversion H; subst; try discriminate.
  - left. split; auto.
  - right. exists v0; split; auto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_pred_inv t v : eval (tPred t) v ->
  (eval t tZero /\ v = tZero) \/ (exists v', eval t (tSucc v') /\ v = v').
Proof.
  intros H. inversion H; subst; try discriminate.
  - left. auto.
  - right. exists v; split; auto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_app_inv t1 t2 v : eval (tApp t1 t2) v ->
  exists A body v2, eval t1 (tLam A body) /\ eval t2 v2 /\ eval (subst0 v2 body) v.
Proof.
  intros H. inversion H; subst; try discriminate.
  exists A, body, v2; auto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_ifz_inv s tz ts v : eval (tIfz s tz ts) v ->
  (exists vtz, eval s tZero /\ eval tz vtz /\ v = vtz) \/
  (exists n vts, eval s (tSucc n) /\ eval (subst0 n ts) vts /\ v = vts).
Proof.
  intros H. inversion H; subst; try discriminate.
  - left. exists v0; auto.
  - right. exists n, v0; auto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_fix_inv A body v : eval (tFix A body) v ->
  eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v.
Proof.
  intros H. inversion H; subst; try discriminate. auto.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_succ : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.

Lemma eval_succ_inv t v : eval (tSucc t) v ->
  (value (tSucc t) /\ v = tSucc t) \/ (exists v', eval t v' /\ v = tSucc v').
Proof.
  intros H. inversion H; subst; [ left; split; auto
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | right; exists v0; split; auto
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate ].
Qed.

Lemma eval_pred_inv t v : eval (tPred t) v ->
  (eval t tZero /\ v = tZero) \/ (exists v', eval t (tSucc v') /\ v = v').
Proof.
  intros H. inversion H; subst; [ exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | left; auto
    | right; exists v; split; auto
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate ].
Qed.

Lemma eval_app_inv t1 t2 v : eval (tApp t1 t2) v ->
  exists A body v2, eval t1 (tLam A body) /\ eval t2 v2 /\ eval (subst0 v2 body) v.
Proof.
  intros H. inversion H; subst; [ exfalso; discriminate
    | exists A, body, v2; auto
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate ].
Qed.

Lemma eval_ifz_inv s tz ts v : eval (tIfz s tz ts) v ->
  (exists vtz, eval s tZero /\ eval tz vtz /\ v = vtz) \/
  (exists n vts, eval s (tSucc n) /\ eval (subst0 n ts) vts /\ v = vts).
Proof.
  intros H. inversion H; subst; [ exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | left; exists v0; auto
    | right; exists n, v0; auto
    | exfalso; discriminate ].
Qed.

Lemma eval_fix_inv A body v : eval (tFix A body) v ->
  eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v.
Proof.
  intros H. inversion H; subst; [ exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | exfalso; discriminate
    | auto ].
Qed.
